title: [Glimae'den Wildwood, Trail]
description: A soothing, babbling rush signals that a waterfall is close by, yet the thick foliage and plentiful trunks of the forest don't afford much of a view beyond the immediate trail and several steps off in any direction.  The incline ascends steeply to the northwest, yet appears to be leveling off towards the southwest.  Standing out like a giant amongst the labyrinth of trees, a sequoia looms to the east.  Nestled up against the colossal timber is a riverstone cottage accompanied by a cobbled pathway.

A soothing, babbling rush signals that a waterfall is close by, yet the thick foliage and plentiful trunks of the forest don't afford much of a view beyond the immediate trail and several steps off in any direction.  The incline ascends steeply to the northwest, yet appears to be leveling off towards the southwest.
